title: euonymus angulatus
intro: Euonymus angulatus, also known as the winged spindle or winged euonymus, is a deciduous shrub native to China and Japan. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Euonymus angulatus include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Euonymus angulatus include teas, decoctions, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using this plant for medicinal purposes.
